mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (code, detail, address, phone, remark, user_id, product_id, price, trade_status, status, create_time) VALUES (#{code}, #{detail}, #{address}, #{phone}, #{remark}, #{userId}, #{productId}, #{price}, #{tradeStatus}, #{status}, #{createTime})
mapper.update:
UPDATE orders
trade_status = #{tradeStatus},
status = #{status},
pay_time = #{payTime},
price = #{price},
WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE orders SET status = 5 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, IFNULL(SUM(price), 0) AS amount FROM orders WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status IN (1,2,3,4)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total, IFNULL(SUM(o.price), 0) AS amount FROM orders o LEFT JOIN product p ON o.product_id = p.id WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} AND o.status IN (1,2,3,4)

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN status = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pending, SUM(CASE WHEN status IN (1,2,3) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS processing, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completed, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cancelled FROM orders o LEFT JOIN product p ON o.product_id = p.id WHERE o.user_id = #{userId} OR p.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(t.month_date, '%Y-%m') AS month, IFNULL(spend.spendAmount, 0) AS spend, IFNULL(earn.earnAmount, 0) AS earn FROM ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL n MONTH), '%Y-%m-01') AS month_date FROM (SELECT 0 AS n UNION SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5) nums ) t LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-01') AS m, SUM(price) AS spendAmount FROM orders WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status IN (1,2,3,4) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-01') ) spend ON spend.m = t.month_date LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(o.create_time, '%Y-%m-01') AS m, SUM(o.price) AS earnAmount FROM orders o LEFT JOIN product p ON o.product_id = p.id WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} AND o.status IN (1,2,3,4) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(o.create_time, '%Y-%m-01') ) earn ON earn.m = t.month_date ORDER BY t.month_date ASC
